sourceOverview.notes: Claude Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5. No native audio models.

activeModelsSummary.llm:
Claude Opus 4.6 [claude-opus-4-6] — Alias; dated release IDs may also appear in Models API
Claude Sonnet 4.6 [claude-sonnet-4-6] — Alias; dated release IDs may also appear in Models API
Claude Haiku 4.5 [claude-haiku-4-5] — Alias; dated release IDs may also appear in Models API

audit.priceRangeSummary: Examples: Sonnet 4.6 $3/M input, $15/M output; see pricing page for prompt caching and batch rates.
audit.limitsSummary: No native public TTS/STT API documented. Use Messages/Responses APIs only for LLM tasks. Speech features in consumer Claude app are not exposed as native API products.
audit.regionSummary: Direct API is Anthropic-hosted; regional/sovereign options usually come via cloud partners (Bedrock, Vertex, Azure).
audit.freeTierSummary: No permanent free API tier. Trial/promotional access may vary.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Treat Anthropic as LLM-only in a provider chooser unless you proxy speech through other providers yourself.

supplementalResearch.title: 2. Anthropic (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 2. Anthropic (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗

**Status:** Active. Messages API at `https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages`

**Models:**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context | Max Output |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `claude-opus-4-6` | $5.00 | $25.00 | **1M** | 128K |
| `claude-sonnet-4-6` | $3.00 | $15.00 | **1M** | 64K |
| `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` | $1.00 | $5.00 | 200K | 64K |
| `claude-opus-4-5-20250514` | $5.00 | $25.00 | 1M | 128K |
| `claude-haiku-3-5-20241022` | $0.80 | $4.00 | 200K | 8K |

Batch API: 50% off all tokens. Prompt caching: cache read 0.1× (90% savings). Fast Mode (Opus 4.6 only): $30/$150 per MTok. 1M context GA since March 13, 2026 for Opus/Sonnet 4.6.

**Rate limits:** Tier-based system ($5→$50→$100→$400 cumulative spend). Extended thinking and adaptive thinking supported on 4.6 models.

**Free tier:** Small initial credits for new users; no permanent free API tier.

**Datacenters:** US-based (GCP infrastructure). US-only inference available via `inference_geo` parameter at 1.1× pricing. EU residency via AWS Bedrock or Google Vertex AI with 10% premium.

**GDPR:** SOC 2, DPA available, Standard Contractual Clauses, zero data retention option.

**Integration notes:** Anthropic uses its own Messages API (not OpenAI-compatible). SSE streaming. No audio capabilities whatsoever. Available on AWS Bedrock (`anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1`) and Vertex AI (`claude-opus-4-6`).

---
